matched_metrics_detail.note: known open issue, documented prior to this run

notes: User ran Experiment 6.1 and both 6.8 nu-variants at demo scale (3000 paths/class train, 800/class test, vs paper's 250000/50000). Most-degraded new finding: OU per-class accuracy collapsed to 53.75% vs paper's 100% (46.25% deviation), disproportionate to the milder degradation seen in the other 3 classes -- flagged as the highest-priority follow-up, hypothesized to be a sample-size effect on the already-hardest Heston/OU boundary rather than a code defect. The low-nu deviation (97.7%) is a previously-documented open issue (Section 6.8 'comparable ranges' calibration ambiguity), not new. 15 of the paper's ~23 tracked metrics remain untested (Experiments 5.1-5.3, 6.2-6.3, 6.5, 6.6, 6.9).
